shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "yet-another-react-lightbox RTL direction getComputedStyle dynamic dir attribute React" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-lightbox-refresh-inherited-direction.md" <<'"'EOF
# Refresh inherited direction changes

When a React component derives behavior from computed CSS on its root element, a mount-time ref measurement is not enough: inherited values can change without the component remounting. Observe relevant document mutations while mounted, recompute the value from the live root node, and disconnect the observer during cleanup.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx test/unit/RTL.spec.ts'
